
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(BerkeleyForestsAnalytics)
```

```{r}
ca_tree <- read_csv("CA_TREE.csv") 
```

```{r}
ca_tree_filter <- ca_tree %>%
  filter(INVYR == 2021,
         STATUSCD == 1 | STATUSCD == 2) %>%
  select(CN, PLT_CN, STATECD, PLOT, STATUSCD, DECAYCD, SPCD, DIA, HT, ACTUALHT, CR, CULL,
         DRYBIO_STEM, DRYBIO_STEM_BARK, DRYBIO_BRANCH, DRYBIO_FOLIAGE, 
         DRYBIO_STUMP, DRYBIO_STUMP_BARK,
         DRYBIO_BOLE, DRYBIO_BOLE_BARK)

head(ca_tree_filter)

ca_tree_filter %>% filter(is.na(DRYBIO_STEM))
```
